# Sub 11: ai/scripts/ thematic split (lifecycle/maintenance/migrations/diagnostics/runners/setup/lint)

## Parent Epic

#11831 — Sub 11 of Epic (folder-structure cleanup; ai/scripts/ thematic categorization).

## Scope

After Sub 8/9 move daemon entries OUT of `ai/scripts/`, remaining 30 files get thematic subfolder categorization. 7 categories: lifecycle / maintenance / migrations / diagnostics / runners / setup / lint.

(buildScripts/ai/ collapse is Sub 12 separately.)

## Source moves (within ai/scripts/)

`ai/scripts/lifecycle/` (13 files): wake/idle/sunset/harness/locks/orchestrator-spawned workers:
- checkAllAgentIdle.mjs, checkSunsetted.mjs, harnessLifecycle.mjs, heartbeatLock.mjs, idleOutNudge.mjs, inflightLock.mjs, resumeHarness.mjs, revalidationSweep.mjs, summarize-sessions.mjs, sweepExpiredTasks.mjs, trioWakeCooldown.mjs, wakeSafetyGate.mjs, windowsBatchSpawn.mjs

`ai/scripts/migrations/` (7 files): one-shot data migrations:
- backfillChromaSharedUserId.mjs, bootstrapWorktree.mjs, migrate-discussions-b1.mjs, migrateWakeSubscriptions.mjs, normalizeGraphIdentities.mjs, priorityBackfill.mjs, refetchTruncatedIssues.mjs

`ai/scripts/diagnostics/` (7 files): read-only inspection:
- analyzeNlTelemetry.mjs, check-retired-primitives.mjs, check-substrate-size.mjs, detectTruncatedTimelines.mjs, diagnoseMcpConcurrency.mjs, review-cost-meter.mjs, validateConceptEdges.mjs

`ai/scripts/setup/` (1 file): one-time setup:
- seedAgentIdentities.mjs

`ai/scripts/lint/` (2 files): CI-enforced static analysis:
- lint-agents.mjs, lint-skill-manifest.mjs

(maintenance/ and runners/ folders created by Sub 12 with the buildScripts/ai/ collapse; ai/scripts/ doesn't contribute files to those buckets.)

## Test moves (mirror source structure where unit specs exist)

Per-script audit: for each script, if a unit spec exists at `test/playwright/unit/ai/scripts/X.spec.mjs`, move to `test/playwright/unit/ai/scripts/{category}/X.spec.mjs`.

## package.json

Affected npm scripts (all paths updated to include category subfolder):
- `"ai:prune-worktrees"` → `./ai/scripts/migrations/bootstrapWorktree.mjs --prune-stale`
- `"ai:lint-agents"` → `./ai/scripts/lint/lint-agents.mjs`
- `"ai:lint-skill-manifest"` → `./ai/scripts/lint/lint-skill-manifest.mjs`
- `"ai:revalidation-sweep"` → `./ai/scripts/lifecycle/revalidationSweep.mjs`
- `"ai:check-retired-primitives"` → `./ai/scripts/diagnostics/check-retired-primitives.mjs`
- `"ai:check-substrate-size"` → `./ai/scripts/diagnostics/check-substrate-size.mjs`
- `"ai:analyze-nl-telemetry"` → `./ai/scripts/diagnostics/analyzeNlTelemetry.mjs`

## .github/workflows

- `agent-pr-review-body-lint.yml` — review for any `ai/scripts/` path filters
- `substrate-size-guard.yml` — path filter `ai/scripts/check-substrate-size.mjs` → `ai/scripts/diagnostics/check-substrate-size.mjs`
- `skill-manifest-lint.yml` — path filters + run commands for `ai/scripts/lint-skill-manifest.mjs` + `ai/scripts/lint-agents.mjs` → `ai/scripts/lint/{lint-skill-manifest,lint-agents}.mjs`
- `check-retired-primitives.yml` — path filter `ai/scripts/check-retired-primitives.mjs` → `ai/scripts/diagnostics/check-retired-primitives.mjs`

## Integration tests

Audit + update any integration tests dynamically importing from `ai/scripts/` flat paths.

## Acceptance Criteria

1. 30 source files moved into 5 thematic subfolders (lifecycle/migrations/diagnostics/setup/lint).
2. All test mirrors moved.
3. 7 npm script paths updated.
4. 4 GitHub workflow YAML files updated (paths + run commands).
5. All affected specs + workflows pass.
6. `ai/scripts/` root has no `.mjs` files left (all categorized).

## Depends on

Sub 8 + Sub 9 (must merge first to free `ai/scripts/` of daemon entry files).

**Authored by:** [Claude Opus 4.7] (Claude Code)

* refactor(agentos): orchestrator-cluster co-location ai/daemons/orchestrator/ + daemon.mjs (#11844)

Sub 8 of Epic #11831. Move Orchestrator's cluster into self-contained
ai/daemons/orchestrator/{,services/} folder. Entry-script renamed to
daemon.mjs (folder context provides daemon identity).

13 source moves + 12 test moves (mirror structure) + ai/services.mjs +
7 buildScripts/ai/ consumer-import updates + package.json ai:orchestrator
path update.

Tests: 119/119 pass (6.6s).

Subsequent subs filed: Sub 9 #11845, Sub 10 #11846, Sub 11 #11847, Sub 12 #11848.

* test(agentos): update laneC spec HeavyMaintenanceLeaseService path post-move (#11844)

Sub 8 #11844 moved HeavyMaintenanceLeaseService into
ai/daemons/orchestrator/services/. laneCManualScriptLeaseAdoption.spec.mjs
content-verifies that buildScripts/ai/{runSandman,syncKnowledgeBase,backup,
syncGithubWorkflow}.mjs import the lease service from the canonical path.
2 path assertions updated (regex on line 61 + toContain on line 173) to
match the new location.

The 7 laneC test failures were entirely path-string assertions; tests pass
post-update. Other 21 unit-test failures observed are PRE-EXISTING flakes
unrelated to Sub 8 (verified via git stash baseline) — grid/vdom/checkSunsetted
tests fail on origin/dev too, separate test-isolation/timing concerns.

* fix(agentos): update MailboxService.spec dynamic import for SwarmHeartbeatService post-move (#11844)

Sub 8 co-located SwarmHeartbeatService into ai/daemons/orchestrator/services/
but my static-import sweep regex (`from '...'`) missed dynamic `await import(...)`
call-sites. CI unit job 26335211375 caught: MailboxService.spec.mjs:49
`await import('../../../../../../ai/daemons/SwarmHeartbeatService.mjs')`
threw `Cannot find module`.

Fix: insert `/orchestrator/services` into the dynamic-import path. Local
re-run: 59/59 tests pass.

V-B-A miss anchor: prior turn claimed "Sub 8 introduces ZERO new failures
with NEO_TEST_SKIP_CI=true"; CI's full unit run without that flag exposed
the stale dynamic-import. Next sweep tooling for cross-cutting moves must
cover dynamic `await import()` call-sites, not just static `from '...'`.

- 2026-05-23T15:18:44Z @neo-opus-ada cross-referenced by PR #11850
- 2026-05-23T15:34:48Z @neo-opus-ada cross-referenced by PR #11851
- 2026-05-23T16:01:17Z @neo-opus-ada cross-referenced by PR #11852
- 2026-05-23T16:22:16Z @neo-opus-ada referenced in commit `297ba12` - "fix(agentos): TaskDefinitions summary.args needs lifecycle/ segment post-Sub-11 move (#11847)

CI unit run 26337262726 caught the regression: `Orchestrator.spec.mjs:476`
expected `ai/scripts/lifecycle/summarize-sessions.mjs` but
`taskDefinitions.summary.args[0]` returned the stale flat path
`ai/scripts/summarize-sessions.mjs`.

Sub 11's substring sweep on path strings caught the test assertion (which
DOES contain the literal `scripts/summarize-sessions.mjs` substring after
the test was rewritten) but missed `TaskDefinitions.mjs:77` where the
filename is a STANDALONE string argument to `path.join(scriptDir, 'X.mjs')`
— the literal `scripts/X.mjs` substring never appears in source code,
only at runtime after path concatenation.

Fix: `path.join(scriptDir, 'summarize-sessions.mjs')` →
`path.join(scriptDir, 'lifecycle', 'summarize-sessions.mjs')`.

V-B-A lesson: when a refactor categorizes script files, audit ALL
`path.join(scriptDir, ...)` / `path.resolve(scriptDir, ...)` call-sites
in TaskDefinitions or similar — the literal filename argument is
invisible to substring sweeps. Same class as Sub 9's bridge-daemon
expectedCommand fix.

Local re-run: 26/26 Orchestrator spec tests pass."
- 2026-05-23T16:29:33Z @neo-opus-ada referenced in commit `ac9cd87` - "fix(agentos): update daemon.spec summary.args assertion for lifecycle/ post-Sub-11 (#11847)

CI cycle-3 caught the symmetric miss: daemon.spec.mjs:30 hardcodes the
expected `tasks.summary.args` via `path.join(scriptDir, 'summarize-sessions.mjs')`.
After the cycle-2 fix to TaskDefinitions.mjs:77 (adding 'lifecycle' segment),
the assertion now needs the same segment.

Same root cause as cycle-2's TaskDefinitions fix: substring-sweep rewrites
on path strings cannot see literal filename arguments to path.join() — the
test text never contained the literal `scripts/summarize-sessions.mjs`
substring (the filename was a separate string arg, joined at runtime).

Local re-run: 10/10 daemon.spec tests pass."
- 2026-05-23T16:37:08Z @tobiu closed this issue
- 2026-05-23T17:00:28Z @neo-opus-ada cross-referenced by PR #11853
- 2026-05-24T02:27:59Z @neo-opus-ada cross-referenced by PR #11839
- 2026-05-25T05:50:23Z @tobiu referenced in commit `5d428ab` - "test(orchestrator): external-config audit invariants AC1-3 + AC4-5 findings (#11837) (#11946)

* test(orchestrator): external-config audit invariants AC1-3 + AC4-5 documented findings (#11837)

Sub 5 of Epic #11831 — external-user configurability audit (forks, npx neo-app workspaces, cloud tenants). V-B-A grep across ai/daemons/ confirms the substrate is already clean for AC1-3; this PR ships invariant tests that lock the clean state with regression-detection so future-agent changes can't silently re-introduce Neo-team-specific assumptions.

New spec file Orchestrator.externalConfig.spec.mjs (3/3 pass) covering:

**AC1 — No Neo-team identity literals (@neo-opus-ada / @neo-gpt / @neo-gemini-pro)** across the ai/daemons/ subtree (includes the orchestrator-daemon entrypoint at ai/daemons/orchestrator/daemon.mjs post-#11847 thematic split). Daemon code must resolve identities via the ai/graph/identityRoots.mjs registry, never via hardcoded literals.

**AC2 — No hardcoded "Project 12" / "v13" / "release:v*" literals** in daemon code. These don't survive Neo-release-cycle transitions or external deployments.

**AC3 — No operator absolute paths** (/Users/Shared/github/neomjs/neo or /Users/tobiasuhlig). All paths must resolve relative to checkout root via existing Neo path helpers.

The walker recurses ai/daemons/ skipping node_modules, dist, .git, .neo-ai-data; stripCommentsAndStrings inlines so JSDoc/comment-prose mentions of the patterns don't false-positive. String literals are preserved (exactly the surface AC1-3 specify scanning).

**AC4 — Deployment-profile honoring** verified at audit-time: all Orchestrator enable-flag getters route through resolveDeploymentEnabled(key) which respects AiConfig.orchestrator.deploymentMode (Orchestrator.mjs:347-351). localOnly substrate populated symmetrically per daemon.mjs:229-261. Not turned into invariant test (the existing #11941 + #11940 PRs introduce additional helper functions like resolveCloudOnlyEnabled for the cloud-default-on lane class; a meta-invariant would need to know that both helpers are acceptable — out of scope for AC4 narrow framing).

**AC5 — `npx neo-app` workspace safety** requires spawning a fresh workspace and exercising daemon boot under missing-Neo-substrate conditions — too heavy for unit-test scope. Deferred to follow-up (will file ticket if not already tracked).

Test-spec-only PR. 3/3 PASS at branch head; ai/daemons substrate unchanged. Close-target as `Refs #11837` (not Resolves) until AC4/AC5 follow-up coverage lands.

* docs(test): correct stripCommentsAndStrings JSDoc to match string-preserving behavior (#11837)

Per @neo-gpt #11946 cycle-1 truth-in-code RA: the helper JSDoc claimed it strips string literals, but the implementation deliberately preserves them because AC1-3 specifically target string-literal occurrences (e.g., '@neo-opus-ada' as a literal is a violation, but a comment mentioning the same handle is not). Updated JSDoc to match implementation + added the AC1-3 rationale explaining why string-literal preservation is load-bearing.
